message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All tasks complete — shutting down">
All 3 tasks are complete and pushed. Great work, team! Shutting down the session now. Thank you all for your reviews and collaboration.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Kent here. Good session. Three tasks completed with clean TDD discipline throughout:

- Task #1: Index page fixed with proper session-aware routing, tests first
- Task #2: Healthy test pyramid established (30 unit + 67 integration + 3 e2e)
- Task #3: Definition of Done updated to prevent dead-end pages from shipping again

The team caught real issues during review (empty nav landmark, missing CSS) that improved the final result. That's the mob working as intended. Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down
